            <script>var dellScriptLoader = (function () {
	"use strict";

	var scriptsArray = [];
	var urlRegex = /^(https:\/\/www\.|https:\/\/|\/\/|\/)?[a-z0-9]+([\-\.]{1}[a-z0-9]+)*\.[a-z]{2,5}(:[0-9]{1,5})?(\/.*)?$/; //exit if not a url or an array

	function scriptsArrayCopy() {
		return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(scriptsArray));
	}

	//check for valid url
	function isValidUrl(url) {
		return typeof url === "string" && urlRegex.test(url);
	}

	//check for array
	function isValidArray(scripts) {
		return Array.isArray(scripts);
	}

	function load(scripts) {
		if (!(isValidUrl(scripts) || isValidArray(scripts))) {
			return;
		}

		//single url being passed
		if (isValidUrl(scripts)) {
            scriptsArray.push(scripts);
            return;
		}

		//handling of array
		if (isValidArray(scripts)) {
			for (var i = 0; i < scripts.length; ++i) {
				var _script = scripts[i];

				//if array of strings
				if (typeof _script === "string" && isValidUrl(_script)) {
                    scriptsArray.push({ url: _script });
                    continue;
				}

				//if array of objects with url and order
                if (_script.hasOwnProperty("url") && _script.hasOwnProperty("order") && !isNaN(Number(_script.order))) {
					_script.order = Number(_script.order);
					scriptsArray.push(_script);
					continue;
				}

				//if array of objects with only url
                if (_script.hasOwnProperty("url") && isValidUrl(_script.url)) {
                    scriptsArray.push(_script);
                    continue;
				}
			}
		}
	}

	return Object.freeze({
		load: load,
		scriptsArrayCopy: scriptsArrayCopy
	});
})();
</script>

									<div class="rwp-ic-slide__description">
										<div style="padding-bottom: 20px; clear: both;">製品の新規購入に関するご質問やキャンペーン、お見積りなどについてお問い合わせいただけます。</div><div class=" rwp-webpart__links" id="sfdcchat-button" style="opacity: 0; display: none;"><script type="text/javascript">
function triggerChat(){
  event.preventDefault();
  var evt=new CustomEvent('startChat',{bubbles:!0});
  window.dispatchEvent(evt);}
function checkTabPress(key_val) {
    if (event.keyCode != 9) {
        triggerChat();
    }
}
</script><a role="button" class="rwp-button__link rwp-button__link--display-PrimaryV2" onclick="triggerChat()" onkeydown="checkTabPress()" aria-label="オンライン チャットでのお問い合わせ">オンライン チャットでのお問い合わせ</a></div><script type="text/javascript">
const sfdcchatObserver = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
   mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
   if (mutation.target.nodeName === "ASIDE") {
      for (var i = 0; i < mutation.target.childNodes.length; i++) {
        var nodeItem = mutation.target.childNodes[i];
        if(nodeItem.id === "uc-panel"){
          if( nodeItem.getAttribute("data-enablesfdcchat") === "True"){
              jQuery("#sfdcchat-button").css("display","block");
              jQuery("#sfdcchat-button").css("opacity",0).animate({opacity:1}, 1000);
              sfdcchatObserver.disconnect();
          }
        }
      }
    }
  });
});
sfdcchatObserver.observe(document.body, {
  subtree: true,
  childList: true,
});
</script></div>

    <section id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6" data-version="7.0" data-type="FAQ" data-cid="821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7" data-iid="contact-us-new-faq-6" data-did="d372a474-0c76-4e2b-a084-cfe739932618" class="rwp-webpart rwp-webpart-FAQ">

                
            <div class="rwp-webpart__subtitle rwp-webpart__title--centered"><h2><span style="color: #ffffff;">お役立ち情報</span></h2></div>
                         


	<div class="rwp-faq">
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-1" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-1" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-1">
							返品
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-1" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-1">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>製品にご満足いただけない場合、個人のお客様は、製品の納品日から10日以内であれば返品することが可能です。 <br> <br><strong>手続きは簡単です。</strong><br> <strong>ステップ1</strong>：<a href="https://www.dell.com/support/order-status/ja-jp/order-support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Dell.com/orders</a> に移動し、注文番号を入力します。 <br><br><strong>ステップ2</strong>：アイテムの返品交換 を選択します。本人確認を行い、指示に従って返品手続きを実行します。   <br><br><strong>ステップ3</strong>：デバイス及び全ての付属品を元の梱包材で梱包し、返却案内書を梱包箱の外側に貼り付けて返却します。  <br><br><strong>ステップ4</strong>：<a href="https://www.dell.com/support/order-status/ja-jp/order-support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Dell.com/orders</a> に移動し、注文番号を入力して［詳細の表示］を選択し、返品状況を確認できます。当社は、承認された返品対象物を受け取り検証した後で、返金を行います。<br><br><strong>Dellはお客様との関係を重視しており、Dellから直接ご購入いただいた製品の大半について、返品オプションをご用意しています。<a href="https://www.dell.com/ja-jp/lp/return-policy" target="_blank" rel="noopener">返品ポリシー</a>をご確認ください。</strong></div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-2" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-2" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-2">
							オーダー サポート
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-2" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-2">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div><strong>ステップ1：</strong>［<a href="https://www.dell.com/support/order-status/ja-jp/order-support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">オーダー サポートに問い合わせる</a>］にアクセスします。<br><br><strong>ステップ2：</strong>注文番号またはDell発注ID (DPID)を入力してください。<br><br><strong>ステップ3：</strong>［注文の検索］を選択します。</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-3" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-3" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-3">
							お届けスケジュール
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-3" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-3">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>詳細は<a href="https://www.dell.com/ja-jp/lp/delivery-info" target="_blank" rel="noopener">こちら</a>。</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-4" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-4" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-4">
							Dell Rewardsとは何ですか？
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-4" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-4">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>Dell Rewardsは、Dellオンラインストアでの次回購入時に利用できるポイントをご購入額（税抜）の3%獲得できる、無料の会員プログラムです。Dell Rewardsの詳細は<a href="https://www.dell.com/ja-jp/lp/dell-rewards">こちら</a>をご参照ください。</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-5" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-5" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-5">
							Dellには学割や教職員割引はありますか？
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-button-5" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-6-answer-5">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>はい。Dell Rewardsに登録し、学割または教職員割引の対象であることが確認されると、最大10%の割引を受けられます。学割と教職員割引の詳細は<a href="https://www.dell.com/ja-jp/lp/students">こちら</a>をご参照ください。</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
	</div>

    </section>


            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <section id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1" data-version="3.0" data-type="FAQ" data-cid="821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7" data-iid="contact-us-new-faq-1" data-did="a0c89be5-5561-4d43-a2d4-f6b41b9c433e" class="rwp-webpart rwp-webpart-FAQ">

                
            
                         


	<div class="rwp-faq">
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-1" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-1" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-1">
							Dellプレミアで購入
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-1" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-1">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>専用のカスタマイズ可能なサイトから購入できます。<br><a href="https://www.dell.com/dci/idp/dwa/authorize?response_type=id_token&client_id=657d850a-459b-4b56-ab6d-361e7181b981&redirect_uri=https%3a%2f%2fwww.dell.com%2fdci%2ffp%2fsession%2fauthorize%3fclient_id%3dc74f2b64-d845-4027-b150-637885700267%26arr%3ddi_for_ro%26ContextId%3ddc19f39cdb5845dd9f941174872ba492&tag=cid=c74f2b64-d845-4027-b150-637885700267&state=fp&scope=openid&code_challenge=E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM&code_challenge_method=S256&nonce=2349547c-405c-488b-b33b-81bea8f22c52&contextid=dc19f39cdb5845dd9f941174872ba492" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Dellプレミアを表示</a></div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-2" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-2" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-2">
							ファイナンス サービスを利用して製品を購入
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-2" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-2">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>Payment Solutions（支払いソリューション）については<a href="https://www.dell.com/ja-jp/dt/payment-solutions/index.htm#tab0=0" target="_blank" rel="noopener">こちら</a>をご確認ください。</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-3" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-3" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-3">
							エンタープライズ アカウント
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-3" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-3">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>エンタープライズ アカウントと資産を管理するには、サインインします。<br><a href="https://www.dell.com/support/incidents-online/ja-jp/contactus/adm-support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">こちらからサインインしてください</a></div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-4" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-4" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-4">
							Dell Communityにアクセス
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-button-4" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-1-answer-4">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >

							<div>製品フォーラム、FAQ、お知らせをご覧ください。<br><a href="https://www.dell.com/community/ja/categories/%E3%83%87%E3%83%AB%E3%82%B3%E3%83%9F%E3%83%A5%E3%83%8B%E3%83%86%E3%82%A3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">コミュニティーにアクセス</a></div>

    <section id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2" data-version="10.0" data-type="FAQ" data-cid="821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7" data-iid="contact-us-new-faq-2" data-did="9fc8a9ec-4d1b-4a9f-8460-464634587a16" class="rwp-webpart rwp-webpart-FAQ">

                
            
                         


	<div class="rwp-faq">
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-1" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-1" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-1">
							パートナーの検索
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-1" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-1">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>お近くの認定パートナーを見つけることができます。<br><a href="https://www.delltechnologies.com/partner/ja-jp/partner/find-a-partner.htm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Dellパートナーの検索</a></div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-2" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-2" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-2">
							小売パートナーの検索
							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">
<path d="M30.48 7.24l-14.48 14.48-14.48-14.48-1.52 1.52 16 16 16-16z"></path>
</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-2" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-2">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>お住まいの地域のパートナー ストアを見つけることができます。<br><a href="https://www.delltechnologies.com/partner/ja-jp/partner/partner.htm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ストア検索にアクセス</a></div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="rwp-faq-item">
				<div class="rwp-faq-item__question">
					<h3 class="rwp-faq-item__heading">
						<button type="button" class="rwp-faq-item__button " id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-3" aria-expanded="false" data-metrics="{}" 
						aria-controls="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-3" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-title jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-3">

							<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" data-icon-name="chevron-down" class="rwp-icon icon-color-Blue  " viewBox="0 0 32 32">

</svg>
						</button>
					</h3>
				</div>

				<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer" aria-labelledby="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-button-3" role="region" id="jp-ja-bsd-821c676d-669e-4c9e-8f32-6ebdead958b7-contact-us-new-faq-2-answer-3">
					<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--content rwp-faq-item__answer--hidden" >
						<div class="rwp-faq-item__answer--copy">
							<div>国外でのサポートも安心です。サポートについては、こちらをご覧ください。<br><a href="https://www.dell.com/support/contents/ja-jp/category/contact-information/international-support-services" target="_blank" rel="noopener">インターナショナル サポートを受ける</a></div>

            <script>function initLoadScripts() {

			}

		}
